method: Σ (segment_weight × delta_pts) per (dimension, value), with evidence-tier classification. Contradiction penalties applied only when affected segment not already in contrast.
v2_change_summary: Re-extraction reclassified many dimensions from 'V1-only / overlay-mechanism' to 'universally-adopted in V1-V4'. Specifically: trust_signal=regulatory_plus_evidence, refund_or_guarantee_copy=implicit_refund, urgency_mechanism=countdown_timer, branding=crown_header are now observed across multiple variants. Evidence-tier distribution shifts: more dimensions move from 'untested' to 'observed' or 'universal_adoption'.

evidence_tier_distribution_v2._note_vs_v1: v1 had 1/5/3/3 = 12 (dropping 1 due to schema split). v2 lifts 2 dimensions from non-informative to directional (refund_copy: now observed in V2/V3/V4 with 64% reassurance metric; urgency_mechanism: now observed across V1-V4 with 6/12 Skeptical penalty).

cta_style.v5_recommendation: Sticky CTA = high_contrast_green (paired with dark theme to mute the Trust Seeker -10pt premium-feel penalty observed on light theme — V4 demonstrated this recovery V3 40% -> V4 50%).

trade_evidence.v5_recommendation: REPLACE blurred_card with real_closed_trade (untested mechanism). Highest-conviction lever in dataset.

wins_losses_disclosure.v2_note: V1's '914 wins · 62 losses' transparency is the structural defense against cherry-picking. Confounded with V1's named-wins carousel and SEBI badge — cannot independently attribute, but mechanism is strong (likely synergistic).
wins_losses_disclosure.v5_recommendation: ADOPT in V5. Critical for Skeptical Investor + Trust Seeker. Closes the cherry-picking adversary objection structurally.

trust_signal.v2_correction: v1 said V1 was the only variant with regulatory_plus_evidence. v2 screenshots show ALL variants (Control, V1, V2, V3, V4) have SEBI registration visible. The differentiator is evidence_detail format.
trust_signal.v5_recommendation: preserve V4's regulatory_plus_evidence (already there); upgrade evidence_detail (see below)

evidence_detail.v2_correction: NEW value 'aggregate_plus_named' surfaced — V1 has BOTH aggregate (84.7% with wins/losses) AND named (TMPV/ZOMATO/RELIANCE). v1 matrix said V1 had only named_past_outcome.
evidence_detail.friction_aggregate_only: 8/50 cross-segment cited 'abstract metrics vs concrete past wins'
evidence_detail.v5_recommendation: ADOPT V1's aggregate_plus_named dual format. Aggregate addresses Trust Seeker; named addresses Curious Beginner.

refund_or_guarantee_copy.v2_correction: v1 said V4 had 'absent' refund. v2 confirms V4's 'Activate @ ₹1 & Get instant refund' banner visible. V2/V3/V4 all have implicit_refund.
refund_or_guarantee_copy.element_level_metric: 64% cited refund clause as strongest pricing reassurance
refund_or_guarantee_copy.v5_recommendation: concretize implicit_refund -> explicit_sla ('Refund in 60s to source. No questions.'). Sharpens existing element rather than introducing a new one.

urgency_mechanism.v2_correction: v1 said timer was V1-only. v2 confirms timer is in V1+V2+V3+V4 banner ('04:34 Left'). The 6/50 Skeptical friction likely persists across V2-V4.
urgency_mechanism.segment: skeptical_investor (41% of segment flagged as manipulation)
urgency_mechanism.v5_recommendation: REMOVE — Skeptical-only friction with no demonstrated cross-segment lift. The first variant in the dataset to remove it.

dual_outline_plus_sticky.element_level_note: 33% noticed mismatch (banner '3 FREE Trades' vs outline 'Unlock FREE trade' singular vs sticky 'Start FREE Trial @ ₹1')

cta_stack.v5_recommendation_per_user_decision_2026: PRESERVE dual_outline_plus_sticky (Option B). Make functionally coherent: outline shows 3 free trades pre-payment; sticky activates ₹1 subscription. Resolves friction by fixing copy mismatch, not by removing the structure that contributed to V4's 44% lift.

cta_primary_label.v5_recommendation: Outline: 'See 3 real trades, free' (matches banner offer count). Sticky: 'Activate for ₹1' (clean — outline already says free).

branding.v2_correction: v1 said V4 had branding=none. v2 confirms crown_header in V2/V3/V4. Crown is universal in V2/V3/V4.

layout.v5_recommendation: preserve dark theme (V4 already has it). Trust Seeker recovery V3 40% -> V4 50% likely attributable to dark-theme-restoration.

price_visibility.v5_recommendation: preserve banner format with refund framing

untested_stack_count_v5._note: v1 V5 stacked 3 untested values (real_closed_trade, explicit_sla, 'See 1 real trade, free'). v2 V5 stacks effectively 1 fully-untested element (real_closed_trade); explicit_sla is a concretization of existing implicit_refund (V2/V3/V4 already have); CTA copy is honest re-write matching existing 3-trades offer. Untested stack much smaller — confidence improves materially.
